factors.summary: Demand is negatively impacted by unfavorable economic and political conditions.

evidence.text: The airline industry is highly cyclical and the level of demand for air travel is correlated to the strength of the U.S. and global economies... Business travelers historically have reduced the volume of their travel during difficult economic times.
evidence.subsection: Unfavorable economic and political conditions, in the United States and globally, may have a material adverse effect on our business, operating results and financial condition.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Demand is negatively impacted by unfavorable economic and political conditions, indicating a moderate headwind.

factors.summary: Pricing power is negatively impacted due to reduced demand and promotional prices.

evidence.text: Reduced or flat consumer spending may drive us and our competitors to reduce or offer promotional prices, which would negatively impact our gross margin.
evidence.subsection: Unfavorable economic and political conditions, in the United States and globally, may have a material adverse effect on our business, operating results and financial condition.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Pricing power is negatively impacted due to reduced demand and promotional prices, affecting gross margin.

factors.summary: Economic conditions are a headwind due to unfavorable global and political factors.

evidence.text: The Company's business and operating results are significantly impacted by U.S. and global economic and political conditions.
evidence.subsection: Unfavorable economic and political conditions, in the United States and globally, may have a material adverse effect on our business, operating results and financial condition.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Economic conditions are a headwind due to unfavorable global and political factors, significantly impacting business results.

factors.summary: Geopolitical conflicts are creating material risks.

evidence.text: The suspensions of the Company's overflying in Russian airspace as a result of the Russia-Ukraine military conflict and to Tel Aviv as a result of the Israeli-Hamas military conflict have significantly impacted our financial condition, cash flows and results of operations.
evidence.subsection: Geopolitical conflict, terrorist attacks or security events may adversely affect our business, financial condition and results of operations.

sentiment.label: very_negative
sentiment.rationale: Geopolitical conflicts are creating material risks, significantly impacting financial condition and operations.

factors.summary: Input costs are rising due to inflationary pressures and supply chain constraints.

evidence.text: An increase in price levels generally or in price levels in a particular sector (such as current rising inflationary pressures related to domestic and global supply chain constraints...)
evidence.subsection: Unfavorable economic and political conditions, in the United States and globally, may have a material adverse effect on our business, operating results and financial condition.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Input costs are rising due to inflationary pressures and supply chain constraints, leading to cost increases.

factors.summary: Margins are under pressure due to promotional pricing and operational challenges.

evidence.text: Reduced or flat consumer spending may drive us and our competitors to reduce or offer promotional prices, which would negatively impact our gross margin.
evidence.subsection: Unfavorable economic and political conditions, in the United States and globally, may have a material adverse effect on our business, operating results and financial condition.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Margins are under pressure due to promotional pricing and operational challenges, negatively impacting gross margin.

factors.summary: Revenue mix is shifting unfavorably due to reduced business travel and increased promotional pricing.

evidence.text: Significant declines in industry passenger demand, particularly with respect to the Company's business and premium cabin travelers and a reduction in fare levels...
evidence.subsection: Unfavorable economic and political conditions, in the United States and globally, may have a material adverse effect on our business, operating results and financial condition.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Revenue mix is shifting unfavorably due to reduced business travel and increased promotional pricing, affecting revenue composition.

factors.summary: Volume trends are declining due to reduced demand and business travel activity.

evidence.text: Significant declines in industry passenger demand... as well as the continuing slow return of business travel demand to pre-COVID-19 levels, could lead to a material reduction in revenue.
evidence.subsection: Unfavorable economic and political conditions, in the United States and globally, may have a material adverse effect on our business, operating results and financial condition.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Volume trends are declining due to reduced demand and slow return of business travel, leading to lower revenue.

factors.summary: Organic growth is decelerating due to reduced demand and economic uncertainty.

evidence.text: The continuing slow return of business travel demand to pre-COVID-19 levels, could lead to a material reduction in revenue, changes to the Company's operations and deferrals of capital expenditure and other spending.
evidence.subsection: Unfavorable economic and political conditions, in the United States and globally, may have a material adverse effect on our business, operating results and financial condition.

sentiment.label: very_negative
sentiment.rationale: The evidence indicates a significant negative impact on growth due to reduced demand and economic uncertainty.
